sessions.intent: Design LLM module: C# type definition + PLang goal implementation

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-6 done. Runtime1 LLM module is OpenAI-shaped, no tool support. Builder uses two-pass LLM approach. HTTP module available for PLang goals.

sessions.plan: Thin C# action (query.cs, LlmMessage.cs) defines parameters for builder/source generator. Run() calls PLang goal. Provider = setting pointing to goal name (default: OpenAi). Tools are GoalCalls with Description. Tool execution loop in PLang. Future: migrate to pure PLang via define step.

after.health: Design approved by Ingi. Ready for implementation.
after.notes: Key decisions: no ILlmProvider C# interface, provider is a goal setting, tools are GoalCalls, GoalCall gets Description. Future: define step enables pure PLang modules (separate workstream).

sessions.intent: Design comprehensive test suite for LLM module (query action, provider, tools, caching, streaming, validation)

before.assumptions: Architect v2 plan is the authoritative design. LLM module doesn't exist yet — tests define the contract. HTTP module tests provide the pattern for provider testing with MockHttpMessageHandler.
before.risk: Medium — large surface area. Need to scope carefully: the architect's test suggestions are a starting point, not exhaustive.

sessions.plan: 70 tests across 10 batches: types (8), basic query (8), format/schema (9), caching (6), tool execution (10), callbacks (8), conversation continuity (5), images (3), edge cases (5), PLang integration (8). PLang tests use real OpenAI API. C# tests use MockHttpMessageHandler.

actions.context: 62 C# test stubs across 9 files, covering all LLM module behavior
8 PLang integration test stubs using real OpenAI API

after.health: All 70 test stubs written. Ready for coder to implement LLM module.
after.notes: Added 24 tests beyond architect's 46 suggestions: type serialization, format placement, tool param schemas, validation timing, edge cases. PLang tests will use real OpenAI with future response snapshotting.

sessions.intent: Implement LLM module: types, provider interface, OpenAI provider, make 61 C# tests pass

before.assumptions: Architect v2 plan is authoritative for design. Test-designer v1 has 62 C# test stubs + 8 PLang stubs. HTTP module and provider registry patterns are established. No LLM module code exists yet.
before.risk: Medium — large surface area (types, provider, tool loop, caching, streaming, conversation continuity, images). Tool execution loop is the most complex piece. Cache persistence and streaming need design decisions.

sessions.plan: Create types (LlmMessage, ToolCall), update GoalCall (Description, Parallel), create query action + ILlmProvider, register in engine, implement OpenAiProvider with HTTP via engine.RunAction, cache via SQLite SettingsStore, tool loop, conversation continuity, format/schema handling, images. TDD: implement all test stubs.

actions.context: LLM message and tool call types
Added Description and Parallel properties for LLM tool definitions
Full OpenAI-compatible provider: HTTP, tools, cache, streaming, conversation, format, images
Register ILlmProvider in ResolveType and RegisterDefaults
Implemented all 61 test stubs (removed 1 API key test per owner direction)

after.health: All 61 LLM tests pass. All 1951 project tests pass. Zero failures.
after.notes: Removed MissingApiKey test per Ingi — providers handle auth differently. Cache uses SQLite since Data.Properties is [JsonIgnore]. Streaming is v1 passthrough.
